content: We can reframe failed exploration trajectories that self-supervised learning currently discards as *curiosity fuel* for 2025 ICM-driven autonomous agents, where the error of misprediction in failed attempts becomes the intrinsic reward signal that drives targeted exploration, rather than wasting them as negative data. This turns the common problem of sparse failure data into a free source of high-value novelty for curiosity-driven learning.
source_topics: Self-supervised exploration strategy improvement from failed trajectories
trigger_topic: Self-supervised exploration strategy improvement from failed trajectories
